title: Integrated GameSession architecture and PR-1 reviewed task DAG
summary: Inventory the reusable M0-M8 simulation assets and define the single authoritative continuously running GameSession contract, migration plan, product projection/save boundaries, and a limited executable PR-1 task DAG without starting implementation.
acceptance: Inventory maps existing M1-M8 stores, scenario runners, Worker modes, projections and save surfaces into reuse, adapt, retire or test-only categories
Architecture defines one authoritative GameSession lifecycle, continuous fixed-30-TPS Worker scheduling, pause/speed semantics and Headless/Worker parity without UI authority
Architecture defines scenario initialization, product read-model, presentation interpolation and authoritative save/load boundaries that remove static product-gate fixtures from default gameplay

Architecture approves a minimum versioned GameSession projection contract with explicit schema/version negotiation, compatibility and fail-closed rules, and assigns exact sim-protocol files to one proposed task owner
Reviewed PR-1 task DAG is limited to the smallest integrated-session tranche, identifies file ownership and allows no more than three concurrent write-heavy tasks
Planning records migration and rollback risks, protected regression facts and measurable PR-1 exit gates
No GameSession implementation, public protocol/schema/save mutation, product UI implementation or release action is executed

history.details: Recorded ADR-0017, integrated GameSession architecture doc, execution plan and proposed WM-0163..WM-0166 PR-1 DAG; implementation tasks remain proposed.

Defined ADR-0017 and the PR-1 integrated GameSession architecture; inventoried M1-M8 reusable/adapt/test-only assets; created proposed WM-0163..WM-0166 DAG with max write width 2; required checks pass; no implementation, protocol/schema/save mutation or release action.

changes_requested: High: PR-1 projection requirements are not representable by the current RenderSnapshot/UiDelta public schema, while WM-0164/WM-0165 forbid sim-protocol/schema changes; assign a reviewed protocol decision/task and file ownership or narrow the contract. High: WM-0165 depends only on WM-0163, but its acceptance requires the WM-0164 Worker scheduler and its required checks name the WM-0164-created game-session-worker.test.ts, so the claimed parallel width-2 DAG is not executable. Keep WM-0163..0166 proposed and revise dependencies/gates.

Resolved MSG-MREN53JS-7E9ED9: ADR-0017 now approves schema-v3 GameSession projection v1 with fail-closed compatibility; WM-0164 is the sole exact sim-protocol writer; DAG changed to WM-0162 -> WM-0163 -> WM-0164 -> WM-0165 -> WM-0166 with max write width 1. All implementation tasks remain proposed and unclaimed.

proposedProtocolOwner.scope: ADR-0017 schema-v3 GameSession projection v1 exact sim-protocol files and tests

saveLoadStance: WM-0162 defines the GameSession save/load authority boundary only. It does not create a public save container, public migration promise, platform save UI or compatibility claim.
forbiddenPaths: claiming or promoting PR-1 implementation tasks before this planning task is verified and done
creating PR-2 or later implementation task packets
public release, Early Access, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or public save compatibility actions

review.summary: High: PR-1 projection requirements are not representable by the current RenderSnapshot/UiDelta public schema, while WM-0164/WM-0165 forbid sim-protocol/schema changes; assign a reviewed protocol decision/task and file ownership or narrow the contract. High: WM-0165 depends only on WM-0163, but its acceptance requires the WM-0164 Worker scheduler and its required checks name the WM-0164-created game-session-worker.test.ts, so the claimed parallel width-2 DAG is not executable. Keep WM-0163..0166 proposed and revise dependencies/gates.
